text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: This aroma... Sirius, might that be Ruhuna tea?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's just, the president was telling me the
other day: among Sri Lankan teas, Ruhuna tea is
notable for its rich aroma.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And you like it with one spoonful of milk... Isn't
that right, Sirius?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hah, how old do you think I am? I only drink my
tea straight now.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Rudolf, I think your brain's failed to move on from
childhood. Your penchant for being a control
freak hasn't changed one bit!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Also, out of all the teas, you like Dimbula, the
most mainstream of Sri Lankan teas. Really, I
don't think we could ever get along.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...You say that, but I see you know her favorite
tea.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hehe, Sirius has always had a good memory!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Tch... What are you laughing at?! Forget it,
everyone scram! Get your entertainment
somewhere else!
